column7: Enhances rainfed performance; timing N with onset of rain maximizes uptake efficiency.
Supports rainfed lowland establishment; complete nutrition reduces risk of mid-season nutrient stress.
Provides sustained N for rainfed lowland; sulfur improves uptake in intermittently flooded soils.
Enhances rainfed drought recovery; potassium supports cell turgor maintenance under water stress.
Iron and micronutrients support plant health in rainfed conditions; biostimulant reduces stress during intermittent drought.
Beneficial bacteria improve soil structure in rainfed fields; nano-NPK supports crop nutrition during unpredictable rainfall.
Promotes beneficial soil organisms that improve soil structure; organic mix helps retain moisture between rain events.
Azolla incorporation in pre-season flooding builds N; supports rainfed variety with organic N when rainfall is uncertain.
Water-soluble foliar NPK supports rainfed crop during dry spells; rapid absorption reduces dependence on soil moisture.
